proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `stage_iv` = 1 have lower adjusted mean `pfs_months` than patients with `stage_iv` = 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ all original non-outcome columns; continuous predictors standardized, binary predictors 0/1.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for stage_iv was -1.549 months for stage IV vs non-stage IV; p=<1e-250 (significant).
analyses.effect_scale: for stage IV vs non-stage IV

iterations.update: Stage IV disease was strongly adverse, so later iterations examined metastatic burden.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each one-point increase in `ecog_ps` is associated with lower adjusted mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ all original non-outcome columns; continuous predictors standardized, binary predictors 0/1.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for ecog_ps was -0.794 months per 1-point ECOG increase; p=<1e-250 (significant).

iterations.update: Performance status was a major adverse prognostic factor.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `has_brain_mets` = 1 have lower adjusted mean `pfs_months` than patients with `has_brain_mets` = 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ all original non-outcome columns; continuous predictors standardized, binary predictors 0/1.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for has_brain_mets was -0.983 months for brain metastases present vs absent; p=<1e-250 (significant).
analyses.effect_scale: for brain metastases present vs absent

iterations.update: Brain metastases had a large independent adverse association.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A one-standard-deviation increase in `age_years` is associated with higher adjusted mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ all original non-outcome columns; continuous predictors standardized, binary predictors 0/1.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for age_years was +1.749 months per SD increase (10.0 years); p=<1e-250 (significant).

iterations.update: Age showed an unexpectedly favorable adjusted association.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `er_positive` = 1 have higher adjusted mean `pfs_months` than patients with `er_positive` = 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ all original non-outcome columns; continuous predictors standardized, binary predictors 0/1.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for er_positive was +0.532 months for ER-positive vs ER-negative; p=<1e-250 (significant).

iterations.update: ER positivity was favorable, motivating endocrine and CDK4/6 interaction tests.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `her2_positive` = 1 have lower adjusted mean `pfs_months` than patients with `her2_positive` = 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ all original non-outcome columns; continuous predictors standardized, binary predictors 0/1.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for her2_positive was -0.471 months for HER2-positive vs HER2-negative; p=<1e-250 (significant).

iterations.update: HER2 positivity was adverse in the adjusted main-effects model.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `pik3ca_mutation` = 1 have lower adjusted mean `pfs_months` than patients with `pik3ca_mutation` = 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ all original non-outcome columns; continuous predictors standardized, binary predictors 0/1.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for pik3ca_mutation was -0.582 months for PIK3CA-mutated vs wild-type; p=<1e-250 (significant).

iterations.update: PIK3CA mutation was a strong adverse biomarker and candidate treatment modifier.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A one-standard-deviation increase in `ki67_pct` is associated with lower adjusted mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ all original non-outcome columns; continuous predictors standardized, binary predictors 0/1.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for ki67_pct was -0.230 months per SD increase (12.2 percentage points); p=<1e-250 (significant).

iterations.update: Higher proliferation was adverse and was tested as a treatment modifier.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A one-standard-deviation increase in `albumin_g_dl` is associated with higher adjusted mean `pfs_months`.
A one-standard-deviation increase in `weight_loss_pct_6mo` is associated with lower adjusted mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ all original non-outcome columns; continuous predictors standardized, binary predictors 0/1.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for albumin_g_dl was +0.238 months per SD increase (0.50 g/dL); p=<1e-250 (significant).

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ all original non-outcome columns; continuous predictors standardized, binary predictors 0/1.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for weight_loss_pct_6mo was -0.297 months per SD increase; p=<1e-250 (significant).

iterations.update: Nutritional and cachexia markers were prognostic.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `treatment_palbociclib` = 1 have higher adjusted mean `pfs_months` than patients with `treatment_palbociclib` = 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ all original non-outcome columns; continuous predictors standardized, binary predictors 0/1.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for treatment_palbociclib was +1.101 months for treated vs untreated; p=<1e-250 (significant).

iterations.update: Palbociclib had the largest treatment main effect, so biomarker interactions were prioritized.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_palbociclib` with `pfs_months` is larger when `er_positive` = 1 than when `er_positive` = 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS adding the specified interaction to the full original main-effects model.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction for `treatment_palbociclib` x `er_positive` was +1.559 months; p=<1e-250 (significant).

iterations.update: ER positivity markedly amplified the palbociclib association.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_palbociclib` with `pfs_months` is smaller when `pik3ca_mutation` = 1 than when `pik3ca_mutation` = 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS adding the specified interaction to the full original main-effects model.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction for `treatment_palbociclib` x `pik3ca_mutation` was -1.665 months; p=<1e-250 (significant).

iterations.update: PIK3CA mutation strongly attenuated palbociclib-associated PFS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_palbociclib` with `pfs_months` is smaller at higher `ki67_pct`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS adding the specified interaction to the full original main-effects model.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction for `treatment_palbociclib` x standardized `ki67_pct` was -0.646 months; p=<1e-250 (significant).

iterations.update: High proliferation attenuated palbociclib-associated PFS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_palbociclib` with `pfs_months` is smaller in patients with `er_positive` = 0, `pr_positive` = 0, and `her2_positive` = 0 than in other patients.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS adding the specified interaction to the full original main-effects model.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction for `treatment_palbociclib` x triple-negative status was -1.337 months; p=<1e-250 (significant).

iterations.update: Triple-negative biology strongly attenuated the palbociclib signal.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a final multivariable interaction model, the `treatment_palbociclib` x `er_positive` interaction remains positive after accounting for `pik3ca_mutation`, `ki67_pct`, sacituzumab-brain, and olaparib-BRCA interactions.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with all original main effects plus selected treatment interactions.
analyses.result_summary: Final combined model coefficient for palbociclib x ER-positive was +1.536 months; p=<1e-250 (significant).

iterations.update: The palbociclib-ER interaction remained independent of other selected treatment interactions.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_tamoxifen` with `pfs_months` is larger when `er_positive` = 1 than when `er_positive` = 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS adding the specified interaction to the full original main-effects model.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction for `treatment_tamoxifen` x `er_positive` was +0.031 months; p=0.2003 (not significant).

iterations.update: The expected tamoxifen-ER interaction was not supported.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_trastuzumab` with `pfs_months` is larger when `her2_positive` = 1 than when `her2_positive` = 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS adding the specified interaction to the full original main-effects model.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction for `treatment_trastuzumab` x `her2_positive` was +0.023 months; p=0.4896 (not significant).

iterations.update: The expected trastuzumab-HER2 interaction was not supported.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_olaparib` with `pfs_months` is larger in patients with `brca1_mutation` = 1 or `brca2_mutation` = 1 than in patients with neither mutation.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS adding the specified interaction to the full original main-effects model.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction for `treatment_olaparib` x any BRCA mutation was +0.021 months; p=0.7866 (not significant).

iterations.update: The expected olaparib-BRCA interaction was weak after adjustment.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_pembrolizumab` with `pfs_months` is larger in patients with `er_positive` = 0, `pr_positive` = 0, and `her2_positive` = 0 than in other patients.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS adding the specified interaction to the full original main-effects model.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction for `treatment_pembrolizumab` x triple-negative status was -0.082 months; p=0.0161 (significant).

iterations.update: Pembrolizumab did not show a positive triple-negative interaction.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan` with `pfs_months` is larger when `has_brain_mets` = 1 than when `has_brain_mets` = 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS adding the specified interaction to the full original main-effects model.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction for `treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan` x `has_brain_mets` was +0.239 months; p=2.66e-5 (significant).

iterations.update: Sacituzumab showed a modest positive brain-metastasis interaction.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each additional metastatic or effusion site among `has_brain_mets`, `liver_mets`, `bone_mets`, `adrenal_mets`, `pleural_effusion`, `pericardial_effusion`, and `contralateral_lung_mets` is associated with lower adjusted mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS excluding individual metastatic/effusion component columns and adding metastatic_burden_count.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for metastatic_burden_count was -0.119 months per additional site; p=<1e-250 (significant).

iterations.update: Aggregate metastatic burden was adverse.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each additional comorbidity among the listed comorbidity columns is associated with lower adjusted mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS excluding individual comorbidity component columns and adding comorbidity_count.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for comorbidity_count was -0.004 months per additional condition; p=0.2991 (not significant).

iterations.update: Comorbidity burden was not a dominant independent signal.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `er_positive` = 0, `pr_positive` = 0, and `her2_positive` = 0 have lower adjusted mean `pfs_months` than other patients.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS excluding ER, PR, and HER2-positive component columns and adding triple_negative.
analyses.result_summary: Subtype model coefficient for triple-negative status was -0.491 months; p=<1e-250 (significant).

iterations.update: Triple-negative subtype was adverse as an aggregate subtype.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of older `age_years` with `pfs_months` is smaller when `stage_iv` = 1 than when `stage_iv` = 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS adding the specified interaction to the full original main-effects model.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction for `stage_iv` x standardized `age_years` was -0.106 months; p=<1e-250 (significant).

iterations.update: The strong age effect showed only modest stage-specific heterogeneity.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A one-standard-deviation increase in `psa_ng_ml` is associated with lower adjusted mean `pfs_months`.
A one-standard-deviation increase in `tsh_uiu_ml` is associated with lower adjusted mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ all original non-outcome columns; continuous predictors standardized, binary predictors 0/1.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for psa_ng_ml was +0.006 months per SD increase; p=0.2525 (not significant).

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ all original non-outcome columns; continuous predictors standardized, binary predictors 0/1.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for tsh_uiu_ml was -0.001 months per SD increase; p=0.8137 (not significant).

iterations.update: Negative-control-like markers had no meaningful adjusted association.
